summary: Iteration 41 - Leave Rules Feature Testing Complete. All 16 backend tests passed. Leave rules API (GET/PUT), period balance calculation (monthly/quarterly), and apply leave validation are working correctly.

leave_rules_api.GET /api/leave-rules: PASS - Returns leave rules configuration with allocation_period, carry_forward_enabled (always false), sick_leaves_per_period, casual_leaves_per_period
leave_rules_api.PUT /api/leave-rules: PASS - Updates leave rules (monthly/quarterly allocation). HR/CEO only. Validates allocation_period pattern.
leave_rules_api.carry_forward_disabled: PASS - carry_forward_enabled is always False as per requirements

period_balance_api.monthly_allocation: PASS - Shows correct monthly period (e.g., February 2026) with period_start/end dates
period_balance_api.quarterly_allocation: PASS - Shows correct quarterly period (e.g., Q1 2026) with 3x multiplied allocations (sick=6, casual=3)
period_balance_api.can_apply_flags: PASS - can_apply_casual and can_apply_sick correctly reflect available balance

apply_leave_validation.validates_period_balance: PASS - Apply leave validates against current period balance
apply_leave_validation.error_messages: PASS - Returns proper error messages when leaves exhausted
apply_leave_validation.role_entitlements: PASS - Role-based entitlements (eligible_sick_leaves_per_month, eligible_casual_leaves_per_month) correctly override global rules

period_calculation.monthly_dates: PASS - Monthly period correctly calculates first and last day of current month
period_calculation.quarterly_dates: PASS - Quarterly period correctly calculates Q1/Q2/Q3/Q4 start and end dates

critical_code_review_comments: Leave rules correctly implement no carry forward policy (carry_forward_enabled always False)
Period balance calculation correctly handles both monthly and quarterly allocations
Role-based entitlements (eligible_sick_leaves_per_month, eligible_casual_leaves_per_month) take precedence over global rules - this is correct design
Quarterly allocation correctly multiplies monthly entitlements by 3
Apply leave validation correctly checks period balance before allowing leave application
seed_data_creation: None - used existing users and roles
context_for_next_testing_agent: Leave rules feature is fully implemented and tested. Key points: 1) Global rules define allocation_period (monthly/quarterly), 2) Role entitlements define actual leave counts, 3) Quarterly allocation multiplies monthly entitlements by 3, 4) No carry forward between periods. Test file: /app/backend/tests/test_leave_rules.py

implementation_notes.allocation_period: Controls whether leaves are allocated monthly or quarterly
implementation_notes.role_entitlements: Each role has eligible_sick_leaves_per_month and eligible_casual_leaves_per_month which define the base allocation
implementation_notes.quarterly_multiplier: For quarterly allocation, the monthly entitlements are multiplied by 3
implementation_notes.no_carry_forward: Leaves cannot be carried forward to next month/quarter as per requirements
